company.what_they_do: punkproof.com is a public (shared/free) email service provider. They offer email addresses under their domain to the general public. Their stated focus is on spam prevention and maintaining a safe, secure environment. They explicitly note they are not a throwaway/disposable email service and ask not to be blocklisted, positioning themselves as a legitimate public email host.
company.raw_notes:
- Public email service, not a private company domain
- Prohibits illegal activities on platform
- Does not allow sending messages to the internet (inbound/internal only, or heavily restricted outbound)
- Asks receivers/platforms not to block their domain
- Distinguishes itself from throwaway/disposable email services
- Claims emails will not bounce
- Has an abuse reporting ticket system
- The org_name 'Alicesec' was typed by the user at signup and does not correspond to a real company found at this domain — it appears to be a user-chosen label
